ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the chemical compound */,
  "abbreviated_formula" TEXT /* Abbreviated chemical formula */,
  "condensed_formula" TEXT /* Condensed structural formula */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the chemical compound */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the chemical compound */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the chemical compound */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the chemical compound */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the compound */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemicals_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research and development project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chemical compound used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project in which the compound is used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the compound used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the compound was used */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the production line */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment used in the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_chemicals" (
  "line_chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line chemical usage */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the production line */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chemical compound used in the line */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the compound used in the line */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_chemicals_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_chemicals_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chemical compound */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the compound in inventory */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the compound is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement event */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chemical compound to be procured */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the compound to be procured */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the procurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the data */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chemical compound accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, inventory, procurement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_chemicals" (
  "report_chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report chemical inclusion */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the report */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chemical compound included in the report */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the compound used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_chemicals_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_chemicals_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the record affected */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
